evals.prompt: Review an existing architecture package where AGENTS and ARCHITECTURE docs drifted from current workflow, and realign them.
evals.expected_output: Consistent governance docs with explicit impact notes and tracked follow-ups.

evals.prompt: Clean a workbench project containing duplicated legacy instructions and stale plan references.
evals.expected_output: Duplicates reduced, canonical references restored, and unresolved debt captured in backlog.

evals.prompt: Update a maintenance workspace after scope change and ensure changelog entries reflect only executed work.
evals.expected_output: Focused updates with valid changelog discipline and explicit residual tasks.
